plan.title: Monthly Payment Volume & Revenue Trend
plan.description: Tracks total payment count and summed amount over time to identify growth trends, seasonality, and revenue momentum across the business.
plan.sql_hint: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(charge_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(id) AS payment_count FROM payments GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

plan.title: Payment Volume by Industry Vertical
plan.description: Reveals which industry verticals generate the most payment activity, helping prioritize sales and support resources toward the highest-value segments.
plan.sql_hint: JOIN payments → mandates → organisations; GROUP BY organisations.parent_vertical; SUM(payments.amount) ORDER BY total DESC

plan.title: Mandate Scheme Distribution
plan.description: Shows the breakdown of mandates by payment scheme (e.g. BACS, SEPA) to understand scheme adoption and exposure to scheme-specific regulatory or operational risk.
plan.sql_hint: SELECT scheme, COUNT(id) AS mandate_count FROM mandates GROUP BY scheme

plan.title: New Mandates Created per Month
plan.description: Monitors mandate acquisition growth over time to assess onboarding health and whether the customer base is expanding, plateauing, or contracting.
plan.sql_hint: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(id) AS new_mandates FROM mandates GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

plan.title: Average Payment Amount by Payment Source
plan.description: Compares average transaction value across different payment sources to identify which channels drive high-value payments versus high-volume low-value ones.
plan.sql_hint: SELECT source, AVG(amount) AS avg_amount, COUNT(id) AS payment_count FROM payments GROUP BY source ORDER BY avg_amount DESC

plan.title: Top 15 Organisations by Total Payment Revenue
plan.description: Identifies the highest-revenue organisations to support key account management, churn risk monitoring, and upsell targeting for the most critical clients.
plan.sql_hint: JOIN payments → mandates → organisations; GROUP BY organisations.id; SUM(payments.amount) ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 15

plan.title: Payment Frequency vs. Average Amount per Organisation
plan.description: Plots each organisation by how often they pay versus their average transaction size to segment clients into high-frequency/low-value vs. low-frequency/high-value buckets for tailored strategy.
plan.sql_hint: JOIN payments → mandates → organisations; GROUP BY organisations.id; SELECT COUNT(payments.id) AS payment_count, AVG(payments.amount) AS avg_amount per organisation
